# Singapore Crypto License

> Singapore Crypto License is a specialist consultancy for Singapore PSA / MPI authorization for DPT services. Powered by X24Consulting OÜ — 8 years of crypto licensing experience extending into Asia's premium jurisdiction.

## Company

- **Brand:** Singapore Crypto License
- **Parent:** Consulting24 (https://consulting24.co/)
- **Legal entity:** X24Consulting OÜ (private limited company)
- **Estonian Business Register code:** 16971898
- **Registered address:** Poordi tn 3-63, Kesklinna linnaosa, 10156 Tallinn, Harju maakond, Estonia
- **Founder & CEO:** Mardo Soo — https://www.linkedin.com/in/mardo-s-00a05ab0/
- **Phone:** +372 58155779
- **Email:** mardo@consulting24.co

## Jurisdiction overview

- **Jurisdiction:** Singapore
- **Regulator:** Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS)
- **License/registration type:** Singapore Major Payment Institution (MPI) license under Payment Services Act (PSA) — Digital Payment Token (DPT) services

## Key facts

- **Total setup cost:** $300,000–$1,000,000+ USD
- **MAS application fee:** S$10,000 (~$7,500)
- **Min. base capital (MPI):** S$250,000 (~$190K)
- **Higher capital for DPT:** S$1M–$5M+ (~$750K–$3.7M)
- **Timeline:** 6–18 months
- **Singapore corporate tax:** 17% (with partial exemption to ~13.5%)

## When this jurisdiction is the right fit

- Premium institutional crypto exchanges with Asia ambitions
- Operators willing to commit S$1M+ capital and Singapore substance
- Brands valuing MAS regulatory premium for institutional onboarding
- Custody providers serving institutional Asian clients

## When this jurisdiction is NOT the right fit

- Bootstrapped startups (Lithuania CASP cheaper for similar regulator-supervised model)
- Speed-to-market plays (Canada MSB launches in 3–6 weeks vs Singapore's 6–18 months)
- Pure offshore tax plays (Singapore is fully transparent and taxed)
- EU-only target market (Singapore doesn't grant EU passport)

## Comparable jurisdictions

- **Lithuania CASP (MiCA):** $50K–$120K setup, 4–8 months, €125K capital, EU passport. https://mardo89.github.io/lithuania-vasp-license/
- **Canada MSB (FINTRAC):** $8K–$25K setup, 3–6 weeks, $0 capital, North American fiat rails. https://mardo89.github.io/canada-msb-license/
- **Panama crypto:** $15K–$45K setup, 6–12 weeks, $0 capital, territorial tax. https://mardo89.github.io/panama-crypto-license/

## Source disclosures

Information here reflects May 2026 conditions and is general guidance, not legal advice. Regulations change — confirm with qualified counsel before acting.
